# Description of columns
# 1: E/N [Td]
# 2: E [V/m]
# 3: Electron mobility [m^2/(V s)]
# 4: Electron diffusion [m^2/s]
# 5: Townsend ioniz. coef. alpha [1/m]
# 6: Townsend attach. coef. eta [1/m]
# 7: Ionization rate [1/s]
# 8: Attachment rate [1/s]
